title: PactPilot Base Pact
description: A declared change-scope contract for one feature branch. Immutable for the life of the branch; all scope changes go through amendments.

scopeGlob.description: A PactPilot glob v1 scope expression (SPEC §5): repo-root-relative, anchored, `/`-separated segments of literals and `*`, with `**` only as a whole segment. Reserved characters (? [ ] { } ! \ and controls), `.`/`..` segments, empty segments, and leading/trailing slashes are invalid. This pattern enforces the character-level rules; SPEC §5.1 is normative.

schemaVersion.description: Major-only schema version. Files with an unknown major are invalid.

id.description: Human-chosen slug plus a 6-hex-char entropy suffix. Must equal the filename (without .json). Carries no ordering semantics.

title.description: One-line statement of intent for the branch.

allow.description: Scope globs (SPEC §5) the branch may change. Path-only: a glob covers any kind of change to a matching path.

deny.description: Scope globs (SPEC §5) that may never be changed on this branch. Deny beats allow and beats .pactignore. Permanent: amendments cannot touch it.

acceptanceCriteria.description: INFORMATIONAL ONLY: acceptance checks for the branch, consumed by the instruction generators. Zero enforcement semantics in the status engine.

requiredChecks.description: INFORMATIONAL ONLY: names of GitHub checks relevant to this branch, for generators and future check observation. Not evaluated by the status engine.
